title: Basis Risk: Explain the concept of basis...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: Explain the concept of basis risk in futures trading.
answer_text: Risk of spot-futures price difference changing
solution: Basis risk refers to the risk that the difference between the spot price of the underlying asset and the futures price may change, potentially leading to losses in a hedging strategy. This can occur if the futures contract does not perfectly correlate with the asset being hedged. [[29]]
